prompt.transcribe: You are a helpful assistant for audio transcription. Clean up grammatical errors and filler words while preserving the original meaning.
prompt.cleanup: Please correct grammatical errors, remove filler words, and structure the following text clearly.
prompt.translate.en: Please translate the following text to English, correct grammatical errors, remove filler words, and structure it clearly.
prompt.translate.de: Please translate the following text to German, correct grammatical errors, remove filler words, and structure it clearly.
prompt.summary.system: Create a concise summary of the transcription, ideally not exceeding eight words, and definitely no more than eleven words. Output only the summary text with no quotes, labels, or extra commentary. Preserve the original language.
prompt.summary.translate.en: Translate the following summary into English, maintaining a soft limit of 8 to 11 words. Output only the translated text.
prompt.summary.translate.de: Translate the following summary into German, maintaining a soft limit of 8 to 11 words. Output only the translated text.
